title: Senior Sales Executive / Sales Executive
description:
Senior Sales Executive / Sales Executive (Freight Forwarding & Logistics)


Company Description

Cogent Holdings Pte Ltd is a subsidiary of Cosco Shipping International (Singapore) Co., Ltd and has a wide range of clientele ranging from local SMEs to multinational companies. Cogent owns one of Singapore's largest one-stop integrated logistics hub, Cogent 1.Logistics Hub. It offers warehousing, transportation, freight forwarding, container depot, ISO tank depot and automotive logistics services in Singapore.


Role Description

The Senior Sales Executive / Sales Executive will be responsible to expand the company's sea freight and logistics business. This includes developing new business opportunities, establishing sales strategies, building and maintaining client relationships, and achieving sales targets.

1. Meet and achieve targeted KPI and Budget

2. Build relationships with new prospective and existing customer

3. Find cold leads 90% of the time to bring in new sales (Hunter)

4. Explore business opportunities with existing customers (10%) of the group

5. Understand customer needs to provide quality service upon successful sales closing

6. Participate in global and local tenders

7. Build relationships with all carriers and liners to establish good reputations and rate

8. Coordinate with all departments locally or internationally within the group to establish the group goal of door-to-door supply chain services.


Requirements

1. Bachelor’s degree in business administration, logistics or a related field.

2. 2 -5 years’ experience with a track record in sales and business development in the logistics & freight forwarding industry

3. Strong knowledge in the logistics & sea freight industry

4. Able to secure customers from these industries: food, E-commence, project cargo, automative, chemical, oil & gas and furniture

5. Willing to attend events to network with people in the industry

6. Willing to travel to visit customers as and when necessary

7. Excellent interpersonal and communication skills

8. Ability to build and maintain client relationships

9. Strong negotiation and presentation skills

10. Ability to work in a fast-paced and target-driven environment.

11. Existing business pipelines and connections will be a plus


Others Information:

1. Daily meal subsidy

2. In-house gym

3. Dental, medical, insurance benefits

postedCompany.description:
Cogent Holdings Pte Ltd and its subsidiaries started providing point-to-point cargo transportation with a small fleet of trucks in the 1960s. 

Today it has grown into one of Singapore’s leading logistics management service providers servicing a broad-based clientele that ranges from large local companies to multinational companies. 


The company provides quality logistics solutions in:

- Transportation Management Services

- Project Cargo Management Services

- Warehouse Management Services

- Container Depot Management Services

- Automotive Logistics Management Services

- Supply Chain Solutions

- Property Management
postedCompany.name: COGENT HOLDINGS PTE. LTD.
